name: Geidea Saudi Arabia and MENA Payment Solutions API
what_it_does: Geidea Saudi Arabia and MENA payment solutions REST API for Gulf merchants, retailers, and e-commerce platforms to accept card payments, process POS transactions, and integrate payment gateway services across Saudi Arabia, Egypt, UAE, Jordan, Bahrain, Kuwait, and Oman — enabling merchant card payment acceptance, POS integration, payment link generation, recurring billing, and online checkout through Geidea's SAMA-licensed payment infrastructure serving 130,000+ merchants across the MENA region. Enables AI agents to manage card payment for Saudi and MENA merchant checkout automation, handle payment link for remote Gulf payment collection automation, access POS integration for physical merchant payment automation, retrieve transaction status for payment verification automation, manage refund for MENA payment reversal automation, handle tokenization for card storage and recurring billing automation, access webhook for payment event notification automation, retrieve settlement for MENA merchant disbursement automation, manage split payment for MENA marketplace payment split automation, and integrate Geidea with Saudi and MENA e-commerce, retail, and hospitality platforms for merchant payment automation.
use_cases: Accepting card and contactless payments from Saudi and MENA consumers for merchant checkout automation agents
Generating Geidea payment links for remote payment collection from Gulf consumers for SME automation agents
Integrating Geidea with Saudi retail POS systems for physical merchant payment acceptance automation agents
Processing recurring card payments for Saudi and MENA subscription services via Geidea tokenization automation agents
not_for: Non-MENA markets primarily (Geidea focuses on Saudi Arabia and MENA region)
Cryptocurrency payments (Geidea is traditional card and POS payment gateway)
Consumer peer-to-peer payments (Geidea is merchant-facing payment solution)
best_when: A Saudi Arabian or MENA merchant, retailer, or e-commerce platform wanting AI agents to accept card payments, process POS transactions, and integrate payment links through Geidea's SAMA-licensed merchant payment infrastructure.
avoid_when: SAMA AND MENA REGULATIONS: Geidea operates under SAMA (Saudi Arabia) and country-specific central bank regulations in other MENA markets; automated non-SAMA-compliant payment implementation creates regulatory violation; automated must comply with SAMA payment processing guidelines. MERCHANT AGREEMENT REQUIRED: Geidea merchant API requires signed merchant agreement with compliance review; automated public API access assumption creates no merchant endpoint; automated must complete Geidea merchant onboarding. SAUDI RIYAL AND LOCAL CURRENCIES: Geidea processes SAR (Saudi Riyal) in Saudi Arabia and local currencies in other MENA countries; automated USD-only pricing assumption creates currency_not_supported; automated must handle country-specific MENA currencies. 3DS AUTHENTICATION: MENA card payments require 3D Secure consumer authentication per SAMA and CBUAE requirements; automated no-redirect card charging assumption creates 3ds_required; automated must implement 3DS redirect for card payments.

auth.notes: Geidea uses API key (merchant key + password) for authentication. REST API with JSON. Riyadh, Saudi Arabia HQ. Founded 2008 by Sultan Al Abdullah. Products: Online payment gateway, payment links, POS solutions, recurring billing, tokenization, split payment, installments. SDKs: JS, PHP, Python, Android, iOS. Countries: Saudi Arabia, Egypt, UAE, Jordan, Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman. SAMA licensed. 130,000+ merchants. Backed by Saudi Aramco, SABB. Competes with HyperPay and PayTabs for Saudi payment gateway.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved merchants; production requires merchant agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: MDR per transaction; monthly gateway fees; POS terminal fees; volume discounts
pricing.notes: Riyadh SA. SAMA licensed. MDR per transaction. 130,000+ merchants. MENA payment gateway leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; payment authorization and tokenization APIs throttled

known_agent_gotchas: MERCHANT KEY + PASSWORD AUTH: Geidea uses merchant key (public) and password (secret) as separate credentials for API authentication; automated single API key assumption creates authentication_invalid; automated must include both merchant key and password in request headers

3DS REDIRECT IS MANDATORY FOR CARDS: SAMA requires 3D Secure for card-not-present transactions; automated direct card charging without 3DS assumption creates authentication_required; automated must implement 3DS redirect flow and callback handling

SAR HALALA DENOMINATION: Geidea Saudi API amounts are in halala (1 SAR = 100 halala); automated SAR riyal-unit assumption creates 100x payment error; automated must send amounts in halala (e.g., 5000 for 50 SAR)

PAYMENT LINK EXPIRY: Geidea payment links have configurable expiry; automated permanent payment link assumption creates expired_link for delayed consumers; automated must set appropriate expiry and handle link expiry gracefully

TOKENIZATION REQUIRES FIRST TRANSACTION: Geidea card tokenization is created from a successful first payment; automated token-without-payment assumption creates token_not_found; automated must process first payment to generate reusable card token
agent_readiness.security_notes: Saudi/MENA payment gateway. SAMA, CBUAE, CBE, PDPL. API key. Saudi Arabia/MENA. Card payment and merchant data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Saudi/MENA payment. SAMA, CBUAE, PDPL. API key. Saudi Arabia/MENA. Card payment and merchant data.
